negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_da81c8b9-d00d-4141-b6dc-429c770d2ff0
prompt: The video opens with a fisheye lens perspective, capturing an outdoor street corner where a person is shooting a video focused on a poster. The scene is set on a sunny day with vivid natural lighting, casting shadows across the environment. To the right, a cement sidewalk runs alongside metal scaffolding and canvas fabric covering the surface of a building. On the left, a textured brick wall is visible, adorned with a lighting fixture at the top and a metal mailbox fixed to it, bearing a red sign with white lettering. In the center, an entrance is framed by two doors with black horizontal lines and a jack arch above them.  As the camera pushes in at eye level, it focuses on a poster attached to the building on the right with zip ties. The poster features a man with short black hair, smiling, wearing a white shirt, black jacket, and dark tie. Below his image, white Japanese characters and a blue stripe display the text "まえばら" (Maebara) and "城司" (Shigeki). Behind him, a red streak reads "All for All." The person behind the camera, wearing a silver-rimmed digital watch with a blue band, points at the poster. The camera then pulls back, revealing the person gesturing with an open palm, sliding the poster flat onto the air, and drawing their hand back. The camera suddenly shifts perspective, moving farther back, and the person's left hand comes out, palm facing upwards, making circular motions. The image shakes as the camera pushes in towards the poster and then halts, continuing to shake. Finally, the same hand appears, pointing with the index finger near the poster.  The background includes muted-colored buildings with white, gray, and brown tones, surrounded by wires attached to both the houses and electricity poles. In the distance, people can be seen walking along the street under a clear blue sky.
